title: petasites × alpestris
intro: Petasites × alpestris, also known as Alpine Butterbur, is a hybrid plant species derived from the genus Petasites, which includes several species of flowering plants in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. Petasites × alpestris is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing symptoms of allergies, improving respiratory function, and alleviating menstrual cramps. It is commonly prepared as a tincture, capsule, or tea, and is often consumed in the form of standardized extracts to ensure consistent levels of its active compounds, such as petasins and sesquiterpenes.
